languages.original_text: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

languages.text: "Я перебрал бесчетное количество комбинаций возможных действий, обстоятельств и вероятностей. К сожалению, пока что самым надежным и прогнозируемым ответом является самоустранение. Заметьте, я не предлагаю им воспользоваться".

"I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."
languages.original_text: "Я перебрал бесчетное количество комбинаций возможных действий, обстоятельств и вероятностей. К сожалению, пока что самым надежным и прогнозируемым ответом является самоустранение. Заметьте, я не предлагаю им воспользоваться".

traits.locale_text: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

"I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

"I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

languages.text: «He considerado combinaciones infinitas de acciones, circunstancias y probabilidades posibles. Por desgracia, hasta ahora la solución más sólida y predecible es la autodestrucción. Nótese que no le recomiendo que opte por esta ruta».
languages.original_text: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

traits.locale_text: «He considerado combinaciones infinitas de acciones, circunstancias y probabilidades posibles. Por desgracia, hasta ahora la solución más sólida y predecible es la autodestrucción. Nótese que no le recomiendo que opte por esta ruta».

languages.text: “我考虑过无数种行动方案、情境和概率的组合。唉，迄今为止最可靠、最可预测的解决方案是自毁。请注意，我并不是在建议您走这条路。”
languages.original_text: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

traits.locale_text: “我考虑过无数种行动方案、情境和概率的组合。唉，迄今为止最可靠、最可预测的解决方案是自毁。请注意，我并不是在建议您走这条路。”

languages.text: « J'ai étudié une infinité d'actions, de circonstances et de probabilités. Malheureusement, pour l'instant, la solution la plus sûre et la plus prévisible reste l'autodestruction. N'allez cependant pas croire que c'est ce que je vous suggère. »
languages.original_text: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai étudié une infinité d'actions, de circonstances et de probabilités. Malheureusement, pour l'instant, la solution la plus sûre et la plus prévisible reste l'autodestruction. N'allez cependant pas croire que c'est ce que je vous suggère. »

languages.text: "Ich habe unzählige Kombinationen möglicher Aktionen, Umstände und Wahrscheinlichkeiten berücksichtigt. Leider ist die bis dato vorhersehbarste Lösung die Selbstzerstörung. Wobei ich nicht vorschlage, dass Ihr diesen Weg einschlagt."
languages.original_text: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe unzählige Kombinationen möglicher Aktionen, Umstände und Wahrscheinlichkeiten berücksichtigt. Leider ist die bis dato vorhersehbarste Lösung die Selbstzerstörung. Wobei ich nicht vorschlage, dass Ihr diesen Weg einschlagt."

languages.text: 「可能な行動、状況、確率の組み合わせを数え切れないほど考えた。残念ながら、今のところ最も堅実で予測可能な解決策は自滅である。なお、私はあなたがこのルートを取ることを勧めているわけではない」
languages.original_text: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

traits.locale_text: 「可能な行動、状況、確率の組み合わせを数え切れないほど考えた。残念ながら、今のところ最も堅実で予測可能な解決策は自滅である。なお、私はあなたがこのルートを取ることを勧めているわけではない」

languages.text: "Olası eylemlerin, koşulların ve olasılıkların sayısız kombinasyonunu değerlendirdim. Ne yazık ki şu ana dek en sağlam ve öngörülebilir çözüm, kendini imha. Unutmayın ki bu yolu seçmenizi önermiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I have considered countless combinations of possible actions, circumstances, and probabilities. Alas, thus far the most solid and predictable solution is self-destruction. Note that I am not suggesting that you take this route."

traits.locale_text: "Olası eylemlerin, koşulların ve olasılıkların sayısız kombinasyonunu değerlendirdim. Ne yazık ki şu ana dek en sağlam ve öngörülebilir çözüm, kendini imha. Unutmayın ki bu yolu seçmenizi önermiyorum."
